rationale: Educ. Code §32.002 governs school district technology acquisition authority and is wholly unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).No conflict exists.
quote: A school district is not required by this subchapter to acquire or use technology that has been approved, selected, or contracted for by the State Board of Education or the commissioner.
_note: Rule text concerns technology acquisition; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption change.
